name: costanoa-data
description: Costanoa Ventures shared meeting knowledge base. Source-agnostic at the data layer: same tables ingest Granola, Google Docs, handwritten notes, and other artifact types under different source values. Current skills are Granola-focused (granola-sync, granola-sync-all, team-onboard, costanoa-search); future ingestion paths plug into the same sync.py via a payload-level source field. Anon-key + Email OTP auth; per-user JWT scoped by Row Level Security. No admin keys distributed.
